horoscope: There can be a lot of revved-up energy to deal with, dear Aries, with Mars in your sign pushing you to get things done and take on challenges. However, Jupiter is challenging Mars today, and this can leave you feeling that nothing is satisfying enough, or it could convince you that you need to take on more than you can reasonably handle. Watch out for both scenarios, and create your own. People in your life, particularly a family member, could blow things out of proportion, so try to take things with a grain of salt. Find ways to release tension and take action that have low stakes or involve putting anger behind you. Avoid expecting instant results. Skipping steps can lead to future problems, so try to slow yourself down while maintaining the optimism you’ve been enjoying.

Restlessness and overshooting may need some taming today, dear Taurus. It can be challenging to know where to channel your energy. Strong pulls towards private or alone time are with you now, with Mars in your privacy sector. Even so, daily business, contacts, and projects are a high draw, making it difficult to know where to begin. Whether or not the pace around you is hectic, you can feel a little rushed or pressured! You may want to stay active, try a new activity, or participate in something you haven't done in a while. However, don't go so hard that you overextend yourself. Generally speaking, this is a critical time to take it easy, heal, and rest, so aim to know your limits today. As well, if there's a difference of opinion that gets under your skin, avoid alienating others.

This can be a loaded, animated day with friends, dear Gemini, or a busy time for being in demand. You may like the attention, but you can also feel a little overwhelmed or restless. Impulsiveness and impatience can trip you up if you're not careful, as Mars and Jupiter clash today. Aim to capture the day's enthusiasm and enjoy it, but take the edge off, as pressure to push something forward can lead to mistakes or leave you feeling you're in over your head. If you've taken on too much, you can feel swamped rather than inspired. You might also be spending or indulging too much, as you have less concern for your "future self" and care more about the moment. There can be a disagreement with a friend, or you can feel torn between two strong desires. Although it can be hard to practice temporarily, moderation is the key now.

Today’s energies are creative and motivating, dear Cancer, but perhaps scattered and unfocused. With Mars and Jupiter challenging one another, there can be some impulsive moves. What you do today has more impact than usual, but your delivery may need some attention, or else you come across as pushy or over the top without realizing or intending it. Be sure that others know where you’re coming from. Underlying tension and discomfort with the status quo can lead to rash decision-making. Wind yourself down if you feel that you’re getting worked up over trivial matters, but aim to tap into the positive energy of this combination. Before jumping into something too quickly, consider your options carefully. However, keep your enthusiasm! It’s a balancing act, but achievable.

Watch for over-reaching and overcommitting today, dear Leo, as enthusiasm can lead to overconfidence, and this may mean you think you can do more than is truly possible. Optimism is beautiful, but misjudgment is possible as Mars and Jupiter form a square aspect. Consider and be kind to your "future self" today. Restlessness is a real possibility now, but you might end the day with a sense that you may have too much on your plate or that you've planned poorly. Avoid making commitments until you've considered all variables. Certainly, routines can be harder to bear than usual, and if you seek out more tasks to add to your life, you could end up quite overloaded, so aim to get rid of something before taking on something new. Or, vary your routine so that you keep levels of excitement high. Watch, too, for overstating your case under this transit.

There can be mixed but animated energy with your relationships right now, dear Virgo, with Mars heating up your intimacy sector and Jupiter warming your friendship sector. These two are clashing today, and you can swing between wanting to be incredibly close and wanting to detach, expressing more independence and acceptance. Try your best to treat problems as opportunities for growth, since there is a middle ground, and it would be in your best interests to find it. If you go to extremes, you might lose both options, but if you compromise, you’ll have a little less, but you’ll have both. Also, avoid situations that could leave you owing, as the tendency today is to overreach.

Today's Mars-Jupiter square can stir your enthusiasm, dear Libra. Even so, others in your life can be pushy, animated, and perhaps overactive from your viewpoint. Ego issues can emerge in your work, with those in authority, or with significant people in your life. This aspect seems to pit your passion for a relationship against your ambition. Avoid, if at all possible, promising action on something just for the time being, as you tend to overestimate your ability to follow through on it. Keep in mind that working through relationship issues should be a priority with Mars currently transiting your solar seventh house, but you can be a little impatient today. Keep that in mind before jumping into something you haven't yet scoped out.

Excess energy may be difficult to channel today, dear Scorpio, due to a Mars-Jupiter square. You’re in good shape for rallying up support and activity on the home front or at work these days, in general, but succumbing to restlessness or impatience now can interfere with the fun potential of the day. You may end up feeling overextended, or the desire to push a project forward can lead to mistakes. Aim to tune out distractions so you can focus on one thing at a time. You might also watch for a tendency to push and prod. There could be a race between taking care of your daily duties and responsibilities and dealing with errands and tasks. Wanting to get your work done and seeking non-routine experiences are both genuine and insistent needs, but overdoing both can only lead to exhaustion.

Your desire to feel, play, and enjoy life to the hilt is strong these days, dear Sagittarius, with Mars in your pleasure sector. Today, Mars forms a square to Jupiter, however, which can point to excess. As well, you may overestimate what you can handle in a relationship, leaving you feeling regretful. Remind yourself that more is not always necessary or better! Watch also for over-the-top promises or expectations, particularly of yourself. They may be well-intentioned, but could be made in the heat of the moment. A tremendous urge to express yourself in a creative, unique manner can grab hold of you today, but how to go about it may not be as obvious. There is a real tendency to take on too much and to make impulsive decisions now. However, if you keep restlessness in check and focus on enjoying what you have, or aim to take on a reasonable challenge, you can more thoroughly enjoy the extra dose of enthusiasm the day supplies.

Your home life is particularly busy or lively these days with Mars in your solar fourth house, dear Capricorn, and today, Mars forms a square to Jupiter. If you feel cooped up or if you disagree with someone today, conflicts might quickly escalate. Doing something non-routine may help to keep emotional excitement levels high. Watch for attaching yourself too tightly to your opinions. Even if you're right, it may not be worth the effort to prove it! As well, there can be a tendency to want things to materialize right away, and if you're shooting too high, this can lead to mistakes or unnecessary frustration. Your best bet is to try to channel excess energy into something productive. Shared activities can be particularly appropriate now.

You're in a strong cycle for taking action on your projects, dear Aquarius, particularly a communications or learning effort. You seem up for a challenge! This is due to Mars moving through your solar third house. Today, Mars clashes with Jupiter, however, and you might have too much on your plate or there are scheduling problems to work around. Determining how much you can do or take on can be challenging since your desire and reality are temporarily mismatched. You can get quite worked up about a method or idea, and mental energy runs high. Debates can quickly escalate! Your mind might race, and there can be many exciting ideas, but distractions, restlessness, or duties can keep you from fleshing them out or making them work. Do your best not to rush things.

Enthusiasm runs high today, dear Pisces. While it’s something you should capture, plans should be rolled out rather than pushed now, even if part of you is itching to take a gamble or risk. You might also feel the need to defend your values today. The temptation to borrow from your future is high, or you could find that you’re overestimating something now with Mars, currently in your finances and values sector, forming a square with Jupiter in your risk-taking, playful solar fifth house. Borrowing from your future is not only about money, although it certainly covers it, but it can also include jumping into new situations without considering consequences and making promises or commitments that “future you” may not be able, or want, to keep. Not much can be lost if the stakes are low, except perhaps a bit of pride. If the stakes are high, wait for a day when your judgment and patience are in better form.
